ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the atmospheric parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of atmospheric parameter (e.g., albedo, temperature) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sampling */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., land, ocean, glacier) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for data filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being requested */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)
